# GitHub Copilot Instructions

**Note:** This repository uses model-agnostic agent instructions.

See **[../docs/AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md](../docs/AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md)** for full instructions that work with GitHub Copilot, Claude, OpenClaw agents, ChatGPT, and other AI assistants.

---

## Quick Reference
- **Context-First:** Check `docs/BUSINESS_RULES.md`, `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`, and `docs/CONTEXT_FIRST_METHODOLOGY.md`
- **Customer Source of Truth:** Files in `cust/<customer-name>/context/`
- **Python:** Always activate `.venv` before running scripts
- **Transcript Processing:** Multi-pass extraction (meeting note → context extraction → changelog update)
